message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor mobile
participant "www" as www
participant "endpoint" as endpoint
participant "haproxy" as haproxy
participant "ipfs" as ipfs
participant "postgraphile" as postgraphile
participant "CITY Custom Net" as citynet
participant "logstash" as logstash
participant "dApp" as dapp
database "postgres" as postgres
database "elastic" as elastic
participant "prometheus" as prometheus #khaki
participant "kibana" as kibana #khaki

== webUI ==

mobile -> www : sign & send events
note left of www #khaki : browser ext or mobile wallet
www -> endpoint : HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
www -> ipfs : /ipfs/{CID}
www -> endpoint : HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
note left of www #khaki : User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.

== api – Admin/Write api ==

endpoint -> haproxy : /v2 – read/write factom api
endpoint -> haproxy : /ipfs/{CID} – readonly gateway
endpoint -> haproxy : /graphql – readonly graphql queries
haproxy -> citynet : livefeed log
haproxy -> logstash : index event logs
haproxy -> dapp : dApp specific events
haproxy -> citynet : Query/Sign
dapp -> haproxy : sign and dispatch requests
haproxy -> citynet : read/write signed factom entries

== dashboard ==

elastic -> kibana : dashboard query
prometheus -> prometheus : poll()
haproxy -> citynet : Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXXX) Balance changes
haproxy -> citynet : HTTP GET /metrics
haproxy -> postgraphile : HTTP GET /metrics
prometheus -> elastic : metrics query
prometheus -> elastic : dApp specific rollup

== dApp – controller ==

haproxy -> dapp : dispatch on-chain event
haproxy -> logstash : dApp specific logging
haproxy -> ipfs : pin entry content on IPFS

actor mobile as mobile2
participant "www" as www2
participant "endpoint" as endpoint2
participant "haproxy" as haproxy2
participant "ipfs" as ipfs2
participant "postgraphile" as postgraphile2
participant "CITY Custom Net" as citynet2
participant "logstash" as logstash2
participant "dApp" as dapp2
database "postgres" as postgres2
database "elastic" as elastic2
participant "prometheus" as prometheus2 #khaki
participant "kibana" as kibana2 #khaki

@enduml
```
